title: Style Hero Section CTA Button with Yellow Background

requirements.text: In HeroSection.tsx, update the 'Our Services' scroll/action button so that its box/background is styled with a yellow color (matching the brand yellow used for the 'OUR SERVICES' heading box in ServicesSection.tsx). Keep the ServicesSection 'OUR SERVICES' heading yellow box styling exactly as it currently is — do not change it.

quotes: action button jo hero image mai h na usko bola tha yellow colour krne box ka neeche wala our services ko waise hi rakh

acceptanceCriteria: The action/CTA button in HeroSection.tsx has a yellow background box, consistent with the brand yellow color.
Button text is legible (black or dark font) against the yellow background.
The 'OUR SERVICES' heading yellow box in ServicesSection.tsx remains unchanged.
No other sections or styles are affected.

constraints: Do not modify the ServicesSection 'OUR SERVICES' heading yellow box styling.
Use the existing brand yellow color defined in the Tailwind config or CSS custom properties.
nonGoals: Adding new sections or features to the landing page.
Changing any other button or element styles outside of the HeroSection CTA button.
